description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the java:8-jdk Docker image with four stages: initialize, build, test, and deploy. In the initialize job (stage initialize) run `apt update -y && apt install xml-twig-tools -y` as before_script, then execute `git checkout 'artifacts'`, extract variables with `xml_grep` from settings.xml, parse `$CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE` for `@cicd:` commands, compute `VERSION` (including optional `-SNAPSHOT`), write all variables to a file `cicd-variables`, and publish `cicd-variables` as an artifact. In the build job (stage build) source `cicd-variables`, compile sources with `find src/main/java -name "*.java" > sources.txt` and `javac -classpath "./lib/main/*" @sources.txt`, create a MANIFEST.MF containing `Manifest-Version: 1.0`, `Created-By: DrWursterich`, and optionally `Main-Class: $MAIN_CLASS`, optionally unpack dependency jars from `lib/main` when `$INCLUDE_DEPENDENCIES` is true, then package the classes with `jar -cvfm $CI_PROJECT_NAME.jar MANIFEST.MF -C src/main/java/ .` and store the jar as an artifact. In the test job (stage test) source `cicd-variables`, skip the job if `$SKIP_TESTS` is true, move any libraries from `lib/main` and `lib/test` into `lib/`, compile all Java files with `find -name "*.java" > sources.txt` and `javac -classpath "./lib/*" @sources.txt`, move test sources, unpack any jars in `lib`, create a test jar with `jar -cvf $CI_PROJECT_NAME-$VERSION-JUnit-Tests.jar -C src/main/java/ .`, and run the tests using `java -cp "./$CI_PROJECT_NAME-$VERSION-JUnit-Tests.jar" org.junit.runner.JUnitCore $TEST_SUIT`. In the deploy job (stage deploy, only on the master branch) source `cicd-variables`, install `xml-twig-tools` and `xsltproc`, set up SSH keys, optionally move the built jar into a versioned directory and commit it, then, if `$DEPLOY` or `$LOG` is true, update `settings.xml` and generate `CHANGELOG.md` with `xsltproc` using various XSL files, commit the changes, clean up old snapshot files, and push the `artifacts` branch to GitLab.
